text.title: Program Weekly Note Template Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: Headline is 5 paragraphs; sponsor stops reading.
antipattern.root-cause: PM treats headline as exec summary.
antipattern.fix: Hard 280-char limit; one sentence; force trade-offs.

antipattern.symptom: Progress lines without evidence; later sponsor discovers regression.
antipattern.fix: Validator requires evidence link per progress line.

antipattern.symptom: 20 risks listed; nothing prioritised; sponsor skips section.
Asks are 'awareness items'; sponsor unsure what to do.
antipattern.fix: Each ask must be decision-shaped (yes/no or A/B).
